settings.html:
<style>
/* ===== Unbreakable Strength — Home (2026 redesign) ===== */
.ub2-sec{padding:clamp(56px,7vw,96px) 24px}
.ub2-wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
.ub2-narrow{max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
.ub2-formnarrow{max-width:540px;margin:0 auto;width:100%}
.ub2-center{text-align:center}
.ub2-oncdark p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.82) !important}

/* headings */
.ub2-h .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Anton",sans-serif !important;color:#17181A !important;line-height:1.04 !important;letter-spacing:.01em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,48px)}
.ub2-gold .elementor-heading-title{color:#FFC107 !important}
.ub2-eyebrow .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:700 !important;font-size:12px !important;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9a9a9a !important}

/* body copy */
.ub2-lead p,.ub2-lead{color:#575757;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;font-size:16px;line-height:1.8;margin:0}
.ub2-lead p+p{margin-top:16px}

/* hero */
#ub2-hero .ub2-hero-title .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Anton",sans-serif !important;color:#FFC107 !important;font-size:clamp(46px,8.4vw,110px) !important;line-height:.96 !important;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.005em}

/* value columns */
.ub2-vcols>.e-con-inner{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr) !important;gap:0 !important;width:100%}
.ub2-vcol{padding:6px 38px;border-left:1px solid #e2dccf}
.ub2-vcol:first-child{border-left:0;padding-left:0}
.ub2-vk .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:800 !important;font-size:19px !important;color:#17181A !important;text-transform:none;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.3}
.ub2-vplus .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:800 !important;font-size:19px !important;color:#FFC107 !important;text-transform:none;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:12px}

/* generic grids */
.ub2-grid3>.e-con-inner{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr) !important;gap:38px !important;width:100%}
.ub2-grid2>.e-con-inner{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr) !important;gap:24px !important;width:100%}

/* reasons */
.ub2-reason{text-align:left}
.ub2-num .elementor-heading-title{width:46px;height:46px;line-height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:#FFC107;color:#111 !important;font-family:"Anton",sans-serif !important;font-size:20px !important;text-align:center}
.ub2-rk .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:800 !important;font-size:20px !important;color:#17181A !important;text-transform:none;line-height:1.3}

/* tailored cards */
.ub2-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e7e2d6;border-radius:5px;padding:34px 32px;text-align:left}
.ub2-ck .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:800 !important;font-size:20px !important;color:#17181A !important;text-transform:none}

/* founder */
.ub2-avatar img{border-radius:50%;width:150px;height:150px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin:0 auto}
.ub2-mono{width:154px;height:154px;border-radius:50%;background:#141414;color:#FFC107;font-family:"Anton",sans-serif;font-size:56px;line-height:154px;text-align:center;margin:0 auto;letter-spacing:.04em;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.15)}

/* buttons */
.ub2-btn .elementor-button{background:#FFC107;color:#111;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:17px 32px;border-radius:3px;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s}
.ub2-btn .elementor-button:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(255,193,7,.4);color:#111}

/* FAQ accordion (light) */
.ub2-faq .elementor-accordion .elementor-accordion-item{border:0 !important;border-bottom:1px solid #e6e6e6 !important;background:transparent}
.ub2-faq .elementor-accordion .elementor-tab-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:600 !important;font-size:16px !important;color:#17181A !important;padding:22px 4px;background:transparent;border:0}
.ub2-faq .elementor-accordion .elementor-tab-title.elementor-active,.ub2-faq .elementor-tab-title:hover{color:#111 !important}
.ub2-faq .elementor-accordion .elementor-tab-content{color:#575757 !important;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.75;padding:0 4px 22px;border:0;background:transparent}
.ub2-faq .elementor-accordion-icon{color:#FFC107}
.ub2-faqhead .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Anton",sans-serif !important;color:#FFC107 !important;font-size:clamp(48px,9vw,104px) !important;letter-spacing:.02em}

/* testimonials */
.ub2-tcard{text-align:left;padding:4px 6px}
.ub2-quote p{font-style:italic;color:#4a4a4a;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif;font-size:15px;line-height:1.8;margin:0}
.ub2-tname .elementor-heading-title{font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:700 !important;font-size:14px !important;color:#17181A !important;text-transform:none;margin-top:14px}

/* form (light) */
.ub2-form .elementor-field-group>label{display:none}
.ub2-form .elementor-field-textual,.ub2-form input.elementor-field{background:#fff !important;border:1px solid #ddd6c8 !important;border-radius:3px !important;padding:15px 16px !important;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-size:15px !important;color:#222 !important;width:100%;box-shadow:none !important}
.ub2-form .elementor-field-textual:focus{border-color:#FFC107 !important;outline:none !important}
.ub2-form .elementor-button{background:#FFC107 !important;color:#111 !important;font-family:"Inter",sans-serif !important;font-weight:800 !important;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;border-radius:3px;padding:16px !important;width:100%;justify-content:center}
.ub2-form .elementor-button:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(255,193,7,.35)}
.ub2-form ::placeholder{color:#9a9a9a}
.ub2-form .elementor-field-group{margin-bottom:14px}

/* map */
.ub2-map-wrap{margin-top:6px}
.ub2-map iframe,.ub2-map .elementor-custom-embed{width:100% !important;min-height:380px}

/* responsive */
@media(max-width:860px){
 .ub2-vcols>.e-con-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;gap:30px !important}
 .ub2-vcol{border-left:0;padding:0}
 .ub2-grid3>.e-con-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;gap:34px !important}
 .ub2-grid2>.e-con-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr !important}
}

</style>

settings.editor: Boost strength, support healthy bones and stay active for life.
Designed for athletes and those wanting to train like one.
Regain muscle function, joint stability and improve mobility.

We help everyday people build strength in a safe, supportive, and welcoming environment. Whether you're completely new to the gym or looking to take your training further, our coaching is designed to help you move better, get stronger, and perform at your best.

Strength training is one of the most effective ways to improve your health, mobility, and confidence – especially as you get older.

Whether you're an aspiring athlete, a busy professional, or enjoying your retirement, our personalised approach helps you train safely, progress consistently, and unlock your full potential.

Wherever you're starting, we'll help you build strength that lasts.
Unbreakable Strength is built around expert coaching, structured programming, technique development and long term progress.

As a Strength and Conditioning Coach, I'm passionate about helping people move better, perform at their best, and build strength that lasts. I hold a Diploma of Exercise Science from Bond University and am currently studying Chiropractic Science, combining evidence-based training with a growing clinical understanding of the human body.

With wins in both powerlifting and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu competitions, I bring both practical experience and proven coaching methods to every session. I believe strength training is one of the most powerful tools for improving performance, preventing injury, supporting rehabilitation, and enhancing long-term health – helping people of all ages become stronger, more capable, and more resilient.
15 minutes. No pressure. Just a chat about your goals.

settings.title: 3 powerful reasons to start strength training

settings.editor: Strength is the foundation for an active, independent life. Regular strength training helps maintain muscle mass, increase bone density, improve metabolic health, and support healthy ageing.

A stronger body is a more resilient body. Strength training enhances athletic performance, improves balance and coordination, and reduces the risk of injury by strengthening muscles, joints, and connective tissues.

Progress in the gym builds more than physical strength. Setting goals, overcoming challenges, and seeing measurable improvements can increase confidence, reduce stress, and improve overall mental wellbeing.
Designed to fit you, your goals, and your schedule.
1 hour private session focused on correct form and technique with flexible scheduling.
Train in a high-touch, small-group setting with a maximum of 3 people.

tabs.tab_title: Is strength training suitable for beginners?
tabs.tab_content: Absolutely. Every program starts with an assessment and is built around your current ability. We teach correct technique from day one and progress you at a pace that's safe and sustainable – no experience required.
No lock-in contracts. Our coaching is designed to fit your life, and you're free to adjust or pause your sessions as your schedule and goals change.

tabs.tab_title: Can I train if I have an injury or illness?
tabs.tab_content: In most cases, yes. Strength training is one of the best tools for rehabilitation and resilience. We tailor every session around your history and, where needed, work alongside your health professionals.
Yes – there is convenient parking close to the studio in Five Dock, so getting to your session is quick and easy.

tabs.tab_title: What age groups do you train?
tabs.tab_content: We coach people of all ages – from aspiring athletes and busy professionals to active retirees. Programs are always personalised to suit your age, ability and goals.

settings.editor: Adults lose approximately 3–8% of muscle mass per decade after 30 if they don't regularly strength train. After age 60, muscle loss often speeds up.

“I wish I started many years ago! Tim has fine-tuned my program not only for ongoing strength improvements, but also to take account of a longstanding injury and specialist advice. He explains technique well, including small but important adjustments, and is incredibly patient as one learns over many weeks how to lift properly.”
“Genuinely the most supportive training environment I've been part of. The coaching is detailed, personal, and I've never felt stronger or more confident in the gym.”
“Tim's approach completely changed how I train. Every session has a purpose and I can see real, measurable progress week to week.”

Unbreakable Strength is a private strength training gym located at 1 McKinnon Ave, Five Dock NSW 2046.
Call 0400 000 000 or email at info@unbreakablestrength.com.au

settings.address: 1 McKinnon Ave, Five Dock NSW 2046, Australia
